title: ShopFlow E-Commerce Platform
description: A full-featured e-commerce platform with real-time inventory management, payment processing, and an admin dashboard. Built for scalability and performance.

title: TaskPro Project Management
description: A collaborative project management tool with Kanban boards, Gantt charts, team messaging, and real-time updates using WebSockets.

title: ContentCMS
description: A headless CMS platform with a rich text editor, media library, role-based access control, and API-first architecture for content management.

title: InvoiceHub
description: A cloud-based invoicing and billing system with automated recurring invoices, expense tracking, financial reporting, and multi-currency support.

title: UrbanBites Restaurant Website
description: A modern restaurant website with online ordering, reservation system, menu management, and delivery integration for a local restaurant chain.

title: DataVista Analytics Dashboard
description: An interactive data visualization dashboard with real-time analytics, custom charts, CSV imports, and export functionality for business intelligence.
